rationale: Re-reveal the opaque spec fns then, conditional on both postconditions firing, bind the shared cpacket `cp` and let-bind the abstract `out` sets so the `match` arm inside `next_get_request_postconditions` instantiates `next_get_request(pre@, postk@, cp@, outk)` on both sides; this gives z3 the pre-pinned fields (`delegation_map`, `h`, `num_delegations`) for each run. We then re-state the `host_state_common_postconditions` constants-pin (lifted to `.@`) and the cleared-`received_packet` clause, and finally `choose` the `next_get_request_reply` witnesses on each side so the existential is materialised — letting z3 line up triggers for the pointwise AbstractHostState equalities.
